description: Complete ROS question bank with canonical codes, response types, and gating rules.

ros_policy.rule: ROS should review body systems without re-asking complaint-specific characterization already captured elsewhere in session state.

problem_pertinent.description: Review the complaint-related system and document key positives and pertinent negatives.

extended.description: Review the complaint-related system plus a limited number of additional relevant systems.

complete.description: Review the complaint-related system plus all additional systems as needed for a complete ROS.

chills.text: Have you felt cold or shivery without uncontrollable shaking?

malaise.text: Have you generally felt unwell or weak all over?

rigors.text: Have you had shaking chills or rigors that made your body shake?

chest_pain.text: Do you have any chest pain or tightness?

palpitations.text: Have you felt your heart racing or beating irregularly?

fainting.text: Have you fainted or passed out?

dizziness.text: Have you felt dizzy or lightheaded?

orthopnea.text: Do you get short of breath when lying flat?

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.text: Do you wake from sleep short of breath?

exertional_dyspnea.text: Do you get short of breath with physical activity?

leg_swelling.text: Have you had swelling in one or both legs?

claudication.text: Do you get leg pain when walking?

shortness_of_breath.text: Have you had any difficulty in breathing?

wheeze.text: Do you hear a whistling sound when you breathe?

pleuritic_pain.text: Do you have pain that gets worse with deep breathing?

stridor.text: Is your breathing noisy or harsh?

runny_nose.text: Do you have a runny nose?

sore_throat.text: Do you have a sore throat?

diarrhea.text: Have you had loose stool or diarrhea?

blood_in_stool.text: Have you seen blood in the stool?

melena.text: Has the stool been black or tarry?

jaundice.text: Have you noticed yellowing of your eyes or skin?

change_in_bowel_habit.text: Have your bowel movements changed recently?

dysuria.text: Do you have pain or burning when you pass urine?

urinary_frequency.text: Are you passing urine more often than usual?

urinary_urgency.text: Do you get a sudden strong urge to pass urine?

hematuria.text: Have you noticed blood in your urine?

flank_pain.text: Do you have pain in your side or back near the kidneys?

incontinence.text: Have you had any loss of bladder control?

vaginal_bleeding.text: Have you had any bleeding from the vagina?

vaginal_discharge.text: Have you noticed any vaginal discharge?

testicular_pain.text: Have you had pain in a testicle or the scrotum?

numbness.text: Have you had numbness or loss of feeling anywhere?

tingling.text: Have you had tingling or pins-and-needles?

seizure.text: Have you had a seizure or fit?

confusion.text: Have you felt confused or not yourself?

memory_loss.text: Have you had any memory problems?

speech_difficulty.text: Have you had trouble speaking or getting your words out?

vision_changes.text: Have you had any change in your vision?

neck_stiffness.text: Is your neck stiff or painful to bend?

photophobia.text: Is bright light bothering your eyes more than usual?

gait_balance_problem.text: Do you have any balance or walking problems?

joint_swelling.text: Have any of your joints become swollen?

stiffness.text: Have you felt stiffness in your muscles or joints?

limited_range_of_motion.text: Do you have limited movement in any joint?

inability_to_bear_weight.text: Are you unable to bear weight on it?

sciatica.text: Do you have pain shooting down your leg?

rash.text: Do you have any rash or new skin spots?

lesions.text: Have you noticed any skin lesions or sores?

changes_in_moles.text: Have any moles changed in size, shape, or color?

hair_loss.text: Have you noticed unusual hair loss?

severe_skin_blistering.text: Have you had blistering or peeling of the skin?

mucosal_involvement.text: Have you had sores or rash in your mouth or other moist areas?

heat_intolerance.text: Do you feel unusually hot or intolerant to heat?

excessive_thirst.text: Have you been feeling unusually thirsty?

excessive_urination.text: Are you passing urine more than usual?

lymph_node_swelling.text: Have you noticed any swollen glands or lymph nodes?

anemia_symptoms.text: Have you felt pale, tired, or short of breath?

anxiety.text: Have you felt anxious or worried?

depression.text: Have you felt down, depressed, or hopeless?

mood_changes.text: Have you noticed any changes in your mood?

suicidal_ideation.text: Have you had thoughts of harming yourself?

hallucinations.text: Have you seen or heard things that others do not?

registry_resolution_rule: Each ROS field listed here must resolve through canonical_code_registry in shared_v2.json.
clinical_priority_source: Use ros_clinical_priority_defaults by system unless a concept-specific override is defined.

selection_guidance.non_repeat_rule: If a complaint question, derived field, shared history item, or previously rendered ROS question already covered the concept, do not render it again in the session.
selection_guidance.do_not_repeat_rule: If a symptom clerking question already captured the concept directly or by derived equivalent, keep the ROS item available in the bank but skip it for that session.

ros:eye_symptoms.notes: Eye redness/pain family kept separate from neurologic vision-change deduplication.
